hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '(^|/)(bun\.lock$|dist/|\.angular/|prisma/lib/)' && { echo 'Protected path: bun.lock, dist/, .angular/ and prisma/lib/ are generated. Do not edit directly (regenerate or use the proper command).' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE '(^|[;&|])[[:space:]]*npx([[:space:]]|$)' && { echo 'Use mise / bun / bunx, not npx.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0

F=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$F" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.md) { [ -f "$F" ] && grep -nP '\x{2014}' "$F" >&2; } && { echo 'Remove em dashes (—); use commas, colons, or reword (temp files intended for agents are exempt).' >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac; exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q 'schema\.prisma$' && { echo 'schema.prisma changed; regenerating the Prisma client...' >&2; mise build:prisma:generate >&2; } ; exit 0
